onPress.description: Handler that is called when the press is released over the target.

onPressStart.description: Handler that is called when a press interaction starts.

onPressEnd.description:
Handler that is called when a press interaction ends, either
over the target or when the pointer leaves the target.

onPressChange.description: Handler that is called when the press state changes.

onPressUp.description:
Handler that is called when a press is released over the target, regardless of
whether it started on the target or not.

onClick.description:
**Not recommended – use `onPress` instead.** `onClick` is an alias for `onPress`
provided for compatibility with other libraries. `onPress` provides 
additional event details for non-mouse interactions.

onHoverStart.description: Handler that is called when a hover interaction starts.

onHoverEnd.description: Handler that is called when a hover interaction ends.

onHoverChange.description: Handler that is called when the hover state changes.

children.description: The children of the component. A function may be provided to alter the children based on component state.

className.description: The CSS [className](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/API/Element/className) for the element. A function may be provided to compute the class based on component state.

isDisabled.description: Whether the color swatch is disabled.

render.description:
Overrides the default DOM element with a custom render function.
This allows rendering existing components with built-in styles and behaviors
such as router links, animation libraries, and pre-styled components.

Requirements:

* You must render the expected element type (e.g. if `<button>` is expected, you cannot render an `<a>`).
* Only a single root DOM element can be rendered (no fragments).
* You must pass through props and ref to the underlying DOM element, merging with your own prop as appropriate.

style.description: The inline [style](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/API/HTMLElement/style) for the element. A function may be provided to compute the style based on component state.

isDisabled.description:
Whether the item is non-interactive, i.e. both selection and actions are disabled and the item may
not be focused. Dependent on `disabledKeys` and `disabledBehavior`.

isDragging.description: Whether the item is currently being dragged.

isDropTarget.description: Whether the item is currently an active drop target.

isFocused.description: Whether the item is currently focused.

isFocusVisible.description: Whether the item is currently keyboard focused.

isHovered.description: Whether the item is currently hovered with a mouse.

isPressed.description: Whether the item is currently in a pressed state.

isSelected.description: Whether the item is currently selected.

isDisabled.name: isDisabled
isDisabled.description:
Whether the item is non-interactive, i.e. both selection and actions are disabled and the item may
not be focused. Dependent on `disabledKeys` and `disabledBehavior`.

isDragging.name: isDragging
isDragging.description: Whether the item is currently being dragged.

isDropTarget.name: isDropTarget
isDropTarget.description: Whether the item is currently an active drop target.

isFocused.name: isFocused
isFocused.description: Whether the item is currently focused.

isFocusVisible.name: isFocusVisible
isFocusVisible.description: Whether the item is currently keyboard focused.

isHovered.name: isHovered
isHovered.description: Whether the item is currently hovered with a mouse.

isPressed.name: isPressed
isPressed.description: Whether the item is currently in a pressed state.

isSelected.name: isSelected
isSelected.description: Whether the item is currently selected.

clone.name: clone
clone.description: Returns a duplicate of the color value.

formatChannelValue.name: formatChannelValue
formatChannelValue.description: Formats the numeric value for a given channel for display according to the provided locale.

getChannelFormatOptions.name: getChannelFormatOptions
getChannelFormatOptions.description: Returns the number formatting options for the given channel.

getChannelName.name: getChannelName
getChannelName.description:
Returns a localized color channel name for a given channel and locale,
for use in visual or accessibility labels.

getChannelRange.name: getChannelRange
getChannelRange.description: Returns the minimum, maximum, and step values for a given channel.

getChannelValue.name: getChannelValue
getChannelValue.description:
Returns the numeric value for a given channel.
Throws an error if the channel is unsupported in the current color format.

getColorChannels.name: getColorChannels
getColorChannels.description: Returns an array of the color channels within the current color space space.

getColorName.name: getColorName
getColorName.description: Returns a localized name for the color, for use in visual or accessibility labels.

getColorSpace.name: getColorSpace
getColorSpace.description: Returns the color space, 'rgb', 'hsb' or 'hsl', for the current color.

getColorSpaceAxes.name: getColorSpaceAxes
getColorSpaceAxes.description: Returns the color space axes, xChannel, yChannel, zChannel.

getHueName.name: getHueName
getHueName.description: Returns a localized name for the hue, for use in visual or accessibility labels.

toFormat.name: toFormat
toFormat.description: Converts the color to the given color format, and returns a new Color object.

toHexInt.name: toHexInt
toHexInt.description: Converts the color to hex, and returns an integer representation.

toString.name: toString
toString.description: Converts the color to a string in the given format.

withChannelValue.name: withChannelValue
withChannelValue.description:
Sets the numeric value for a given channel, and returns a new Color object.
Throws an error if the channel is unsupported in the current color format.

maxValue.name: maxValue
maxValue.description: The maximum value of the color channel.

minValue.name: minValue
minValue.description: The minimum value of the color channel.

pageSize.name: pageSize
pageSize.description: The page step value of the color channel, used when incrementing and decrementing.

step.name: step
step.description: The step value of the color channel, used when incrementing and decrementing.

isDisabled.name: isDisabled
isDisabled.description:
Whether the item is non-interactive, i.e. both selection and actions are disabled and the item may
not be focused. Dependent on `disabledKeys` and `disabledBehavior`.

isDragging.name: isDragging
isDragging.description: Whether the item is currently being dragged.

isDropTarget.name: isDropTarget
isDropTarget.description: Whether the item is currently an active drop target.

isFocused.name: isFocused
isFocused.description: Whether the item is currently focused.

isFocusVisible.name: isFocusVisible
isFocusVisible.description: Whether the item is currently keyboard focused.

isHovered.name: isHovered
isHovered.description: Whether the item is currently hovered with a mouse.

isPressed.name: isPressed
isPressed.description: Whether the item is currently in a pressed state.

isSelected.name: isSelected
isSelected.description: Whether the item is currently selected.

pointerType.name: pointerType
pointerType.description: The pointer type that triggered the hover event.

target.name: target
target.description: The target element of the hover event.

type.name: type
type.description: The type of hover event being fired.

altKey.name: altKey
altKey.description: Whether the alt keyboard modifier was held during the press event.

continuePropagation.name: continuePropagation
continuePropagation.description:
By default, press events stop propagation to parent elements.
In cases where a handler decides not to handle a specific event,
it can call `continuePropagation()` to allow a parent to handle it.

ctrlKey.name: ctrlKey
ctrlKey.description: Whether the ctrl keyboard modifier was held during the press event.

key.name: key
key.description:
The key that triggered the press event, if it was triggered by a keyboard interaction.
This is useful for differentiating between Space and Enter key presses.

metaKey.name: metaKey
metaKey.description: Whether the meta keyboard modifier was held during the press event.

pointerType.name: pointerType
pointerType.description: The pointer type that triggered the press event.

shiftKey.name: shiftKey
shiftKey.description: Whether the shift keyboard modifier was held during the press event.

target.name: target
target.description: The target element of the press event.

type.name: type
type.description: The type of press event being fired.

x.name: x
x.description: X position relative to the target.

y.name: y
y.description: Y position relative to the target.
